name: Sole En Gougons
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the fillet of sole diagonally into 1/2 inch strips.
2. Beat together the egg yolk, milk, salt, and pepper until well blended.
3. Soak the fish strips in the egg mixture for a few minutes.
4. Coat each piece with bread crumbs.
5. Roll each piece between palms to get a rounded strip.
6. Fry in shallow hot oil (375°F) until golden brown (3 minutes).
7. Drain on paper towels.
8. Serve on warm platter.
